sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63983" key="loxhtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λοχ-ητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n63983.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lying in wait, treacherous</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Adam.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
